title: hieracium brevifolium subsp. virgaureiforme
intro: Hieracium brevifolium subsp. virgaureiforme is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium brevifolium plant, a type of hawkweed that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium brevifolium subsp. virgaureiforme are said to include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
